title: Bottom Panel Problems
description: Studio UI for **Bottom Panel Problems**: a read-only view of **warnings and errors** derived from the local Studio output session buffer. Workflow blockers from `getChangeStatus` belong on change **Overview**, not here. In the shell bottom strip it is the **second** tab (after **Output**, before **Logs**).
context: Studio UI for **Bottom Panel Problems**: a read-only view of **warnings and errors** derived from the local Studio output session buffer. Workflow blockers from `getChangeStatus` belong on change **Overview**, not here. In the shell bottom strip it is the **second** tab (after **Output**, before **Logs**).

rules.requirement: Problems is the middle bottom tab
rules: The shell MUST render **Problems** immediately after **Output** in the bottom tab strip.

rules.requirement: Problems filters local output by severity
rules:
The panel MUST list lines from the local output buffer where `level` is `warn` or `error` only. It MUST NOT maintain a separate duplicate buffer.

Validation failures (`✗ …`) and warnings (`⚠ …`) MUST be appended to the output stream with matching levels so they appear here after validate completes.
When no warn/error lines exist, the panel MUST show: *Warnings and errors from studio actions appear here.*

rules.requirement: view uses local output state only
rules: Components MUST consume Problems data through the same local output session buffer used by **Output**, and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view is independent from remote log fetches
rules: Problems rendering MUST NOT depend on remote `/logs` fetches. Remote log failures MUST NOT prevent warn/error entries already present in the local output buffer from rendering.

scenarios.requirement: Problems is the middle bottom tab
scenarios.name: Problems tab follows Output
when: user views the bottom tab strip
then: Problems is the second tab after Output

scenarios.requirement: Problems filters local output by severity
scenarios.name: Warn and error lines appear after validate
given: validation returns a warning line prefixed with ⚠
when: shell appends local output with level warn
then: AND Output panel lists all validation lines including info

scenarios.requirement: Problems filters local output by severity
scenarios.name: Info-only lines do not appear in Problems
given: shell appends an info output line
then: that line is not listed in Problems

scenarios.requirement: Problems filters local output by severity
scenarios.name: Workflow blockers stay on Overview
Empty problems shows correct placeholder
when: no warn or error output entries exist
then: AND does not mention validation-only copy

scenarios.requirement: view uses local output state only
scenarios.name: Problems derives from the same local output buffer as Output
when: Output and Problems are inspected together
then: Problems filters the local output buffer
AND no separate remote studio-output fetch is required

scenarios.requirement: view is independent from remote log fetches
scenarios.name: Remote log failure does not block Problems rendering
given: warn/error entries already exist in the local output buffer
then: Problems still renders those local entries
